title: Employee can register, activate, and access their profile
description: Verifies that a new employee can register, activate the account, log in, and retrieve their authenticated profile successfully.

steps.description: Fill in the username field with a new employee username
Fill in the email field with a new employee email
Fill in the password field with a valid password
Fill in a valid activation token into the token field
Fill in {{LOGIN_USER}} into the email field
Fill in {{LOGIN_PASSWORD}} into the password field
Verify the authenticated profile is displayed
Verify the user is shown as active

title: User sees a safe response for invalid login and protected profile access
description: Verifies that incorrect credentials are rejected and the profile page remains inaccessible without an authenticated session.

steps.description: Fill in the email field with an existing user email
Fill in the password field with an incorrect password
Verify an invalid credentials error is visible
Open the profile view without signing in
Verify an unauthorized access message is visible

title: Employee can check in and later check out for today
description: Verifies that an employee can see today’s attendance state, complete check-in, and complete check-out successfully.

steps.description: Fill in {{LOGIN_USER}} into the email field
Fill in {{LOGIN_PASSWORD}} into the password field
Verify the attendance state shows a completed workday
Verify the attendance record is present in today's view

title: Inactive user cannot log in until activated
description: Verifies that an inactive account is blocked from logging in and the user is told the account is inactive.

steps.description: Fill in the email field with an inactive user email
Fill in the password field with the matching password
Verify an inactive account error is visible

title: Employee can log out from an authenticated session
description: Verifies that a signed-in user can end the session and is returned to an unauthenticated state.

steps.description: Fill in {{LOGIN_USER}} into the email field
Fill in {{LOGIN_PASSWORD}} into the password field
Verify authenticated profile access is no longer available

title: Authenticated user can change password and remain signed in
description: Verifies that a logged-in user can change their password successfully from the authenticated session.

steps.description: Fill in {{LOGIN_USER}} into the email field
Fill in {{LOGIN_PASSWORD}} into the password field
Fill in a valid current password into the current password field
Fill in a new valid password into the new password field
Verify a password change confirmation is visible

title: Superadmin can view users and update a user role and status
description: Verifies that a Superadmin can open the user list and change a user’s role and active status successfully.

steps.description: Fill in {{LOGIN_USER}} into the email field
Fill in {{LOGIN_PASSWORD}} into the password field
Select a user from the list
Verify the updated user record is shown
Verify the new role and status are reflected

title: Employee sees validation when check-in data is incomplete
description: Verifies that check-in is blocked when required attendance data such as GPS or selfie information is missing.

steps.description: Fill in {{LOGIN_USER}} into the email field
Fill in {{LOGIN_PASSWORD}} into the password field
Submit the check-in without providing required location or selfie information
Verify an attendance validation error is visible

title: Employee can submit a leave request and view balance information
description: Verifies that an employee can create a leave request and see leave balance or ledger information afterward.

steps.description: Fill in {{LOGIN_USER}} into the email field
Fill in {{LOGIN_PASSWORD}} into the password field
Fill in a valid leave date range
Verify the submitted leave request is displayed
Verify the leave balance information is displayed

title: Superadmin can create and edit an employee record
description: Verifies that a Superadmin can create an employee record and then update the employee profile details.

steps.description: Fill in {{LOGIN_USER}} into the email field
Fill in {{LOGIN_PASSWORD}} into the password field
Fill in the required employee details
Open the newly created employee record
Verify the employee record is displayed
Verify the updated employee details are reflected

title: Employee submits a leave request
description: An employee can submit a leave request with valid details and the request is created in pending state with balance held.

steps.description: Fill in the login credentials for an employee account
Fill in a valid leave type
Fill in a valid date range
Verify the new leave request is visible in pending state
Verify the leave balance is reduced or held for the submitted request

title: User can request password recovery safely
description: Verifies that requesting password recovery with an unknown email completes without revealing whether the account exists.

steps.description: Fill in the email field with an unknown email address
Verify a safe success confirmation is visible

title: Superadmin can approve or reject a pending leave request
description: Verifies that a Superadmin can review a pending leave request and complete an approval decision successfully.

steps.description: Fill in {{LOGIN_USER}} into the email field
Fill in {{LOGIN_PASSWORD}} into the password field
Verify the leave request shows the final decision
Verify the audit status is reflected in the review view

title: Superadmin approves a pending leave request
description: A superadmin can review a pending leave request and approve it, resulting in an approved status and updated balance.

steps.description: Fill in the login credentials for a superadmin account
Verify the leave request is shown as approved
Verify the employee leave balance reflects the approval

title: Superadmin can link a registered user to an employee profile
description: Verifies that a Superadmin can create an employee profile for an existing registered user successfully.

steps.description: Fill in {{LOGIN_USER}} into the email field
Fill in {{LOGIN_PASSWORD}} into the password field
Select a registered user without an employee profile
Create an employee profile for the selected user
Verify the linked employee profile is displayed

title: Superadmin creates and approves a KPI result
description: A superadmin can create KPI setup data, assign it, submit a result, and approve it so the result is shown as approved.

steps.description: Fill in the login credentials for a superadmin account
Create a KPI template with valid items and total weight
Assign the KPI template to an employee
Create or update a KPI result score
Verify the KPI result is shown as approved
Verify the assigned KPI item is visible in the results flow

title: Employee can create and submit a KPI result
description: Verifies that an employee can open assigned KPI work, enter results, and submit them for review.

steps.description: Fill in {{LOGIN_USER}} into the email field
Fill in {{LOGIN_PASSWORD}} into the password field
Verify the KPI result is shown as submitted

title: Superadmin rejects a pending leave request with a reason
description: A superadmin can reject a pending leave request by providing a reason and the request is marked rejected with an audit trail outcome.

steps.description: Fill in the login credentials for a superadmin account
Verify the leave request is shown as rejected
Verify the rejection outcome is recorded in the request history

title: Superadmin can create a KPI template and assign it
description: Verifies that a Superadmin can create a KPI template and assign it to an employee or group successfully.

steps.description: Fill in {{LOGIN_USER}} into the email field
Fill in {{LOGIN_PASSWORD}} into the password field
Open the KPI template management view
Fill in the KPI template details
Assign the KPI template to a target employee
Verify the KPI template is displayed

title: Employee can view own payroll and notifications
description: An authenticated employee can access their own payroll data and current notifications from the app.

steps.description: Fill in the login credentials for an employee account
Verify own payroll data is displayed

title: Superadmin can review and approve a submitted KPI result
description: Verifies that a Superadmin can open a submitted KPI result and approve it successfully.

steps.description: Fill in {{LOGIN_USER}} into the email field
Fill in {{LOGIN_PASSWORD}} into the password field
Verify the KPI result shows an approved status

title: Employee can access their protected selfie history
description: Verifies that an employee can open protected selfie access for their own attendance record and view the selfie history successfully.

steps.description: Fill in {{LOGIN_USER}} into the email field
Fill in {{LOGIN_PASSWORD}} into the password field
Open the selfie for one of the user's own attendance records
Verify the protected selfie is displayed
Verify the selfie belongs to the current user

title: Employee views leave balance summary and history
description: An employee can open leave balance views and see the current summary plus ledger history.

steps.description: Fill in the login credentials for an employee account
Verify the current leave balance summary is displayed
Verify leave balance ledger history is displayed

title: Superadmin can review attendance reports and generate a PDF
description: A superadmin can open attendance reporting and generate the protected report output for the same scope.

steps.description: Fill in the login credentials for a superadmin account
Verify attendance report data is displayed
Verify a report PDF is available for the current report scope

title: Superadmin can review attendance exceptions
description: Verifies that a Superadmin can open the attendance exceptions queue and see pending items for review.

steps.description: Fill in {{LOGIN_USER}} into the email field
Fill in {{LOGIN_PASSWORD}} into the password field
Verify the exceptions list is displayed

title: Superadmin can view attendance reports and generate a PDF export
description: Verifies that a Superadmin can open attendance reporting and generate a printable or PDF export view successfully.

steps.description: Fill in {{LOGIN_USER}} into the email field
Fill in {{LOGIN_PASSWORD}} into the password field
Generate the report for a valid period
Verify attendance report data is displayed
Verify an export-ready report view is displayed

title: Employee can create an overtime request and view rates
description: An employee can submit an overtime request with valid details and view the available overtime rates.

steps.description: Fill in the login credentials for an employee account
Fill in a valid overtime request
Verify the overtime request is visible

title: Superadmin can view payroll and overtime information
description: Verifies that a Superadmin can access payroll period listings and review overtime-related data successfully.

steps.description: Fill in {{LOGIN_USER}} into the email field
Fill in {{LOGIN_PASSWORD}} into the password field
Verify payroll period information is displayed

title: User cannot access another employee’s protected data
description: Verifies that RBAC prevents an authenticated user from opening another employee’s record or protected selfie content.

steps.description: Fill in {{LOGIN_USER}} into the email field
Fill in {{LOGIN_PASSWORD}} into the password field
Open another employee's record or protected file from the UI
Verify the protected record is not displayed

title: Employee cannot submit overlapping leave dates
description: An employee is prevented from creating a leave request that overlaps an existing active leave request and sees a validation error.

steps.description: Fill in the login credentials for an employee account
Fill in a date range that overlaps an existing leave request
Verify a leave overlap validation error is visible

title: Superadmin cannot create a KPI template with invalid total weight
description: A KPI template with an invalid total weight is rejected and the validation error is shown before any template is created.

steps.description: Fill in the login credentials for a superadmin account
Create a KPI template with items whose total weight does not match policy
Verify a KPI template weight validation error is visible

title: Superadmin must provide a rejection reason
description: A rejection cannot be submitted without a reason and the form shows a validation error instead of changing the request state.

steps.description: Fill in the login credentials for a superadmin account
Choose to reject the leave request
Submit the rejection without entering a reason
Verify a rejection reason validation error is visible
Verify the leave request remains pending

title: Public health and version pages are accessible without login
description: Anyone can open the health and version pages and see safe public status information without signing in.

steps.description: Verify a public health status is displayed
Verify public version metadata is displayed
